title: MOCJ — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Mayor's Office of Criminal Justice (MOCJ) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the MOCJ WordPress site (criminaljustice.cityofnewyork.us), the single NYC Open Data dataset (Supervised Release Dockets, atne-2dki), and MOCJ's Sequential Intercept Model coordination framework. Includes the NYC geography spine, MOCJ's program/issue vocabularies, and the Sequential Intercept enum.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

SequentialIntercept.description: MOCJ's Sequential Intercept Model stage (0-5) — how a program sits along the path from community to reentry. Mirrors the site's 'Programs by Intercept' navigation.

ProgramReference.description: A reference to a MOCJ program by name/slug.

programId.description: WordPress post ID for the program.

Provider.description: A community-based organization (CBO) or provider that operates a MOCJ-funded program.
